prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津综合类最低位次分别为约1672名→1417名→939名→1040名→1092名。2021至2023年位次持续前移（竞争加剧），2023年达到近年最高点939名后，2024–2025年小幅后移约153名；2025年基准位次约1092名；该校在天津综合类招生计划：2021年35人、2022年36人、2023年22人、2024年33人、2025年32人；2026年计划30人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定位列第10名，属于全国Top10顶尖高校，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面（涉及师德师风谣言，校方已澄清并立案），但整体影响有限；抖音热度为较热（总排名第24，综合热度约184万），短视频曝光处于中上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达13个，包括动力工程及工程热物理A+、控制科学与工程A+、机械工程A+、电气工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、材料科学与工程A等，工科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校王牌学科高度契合；天津2026年考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），竞争基数扩大；省控线（本科批）2021–2025年从463分缓慢升至476分，整体平稳；该校位于陕西省（非本省），在天津招生占比约2%左右，属跨省招生；天津考生对京、津、陕等地高校接受度较高，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1092名、2026年小幅缩招（30人 vs 32人）、天津考生总数持续增长（约82000人）以及该校顶尖工科实力带来的稳定吸引力，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约1031名，波动区间913–1149名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（计算机科学技术类）
- 自动化
- 工科试验班（电气类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源类）
- 理科试验班（数学类）
- 工科试验班（智能制造类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航天航空类）
- 工科试验班（管理类）
- 会计学（ACCA）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间913–1149名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（计算机/自动化/电气）作为冲刺、三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<913名）可重点冲击一档A+学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>1149名）建议以三档为主，谨慎选择二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 1672 → 1417 → 939 → 1040 → 1092. Rankings moved forward continuously from 2021 to 2023 (intensified competition), reaching a recent high of 939 in 2023, then slightly moved back by about 153 places in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1092. The enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin Comprehensive category: 35 in 2021, 36 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 33 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 30, a decrease of 2 compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the national Top 10 elite universities, highly attractive to high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (involving rumors about teacher ethics, which the university has clarified and filed a case), but the overall impact is limited. Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 24th overall, with comprehensive popularity of about 1.84 million), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, reflecting moderate application attention. No obvious records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above, including Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's flagship disciplines. The total number of Tianjin examinees in 2026 is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), expanding the competition base. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) slowly rose from 463 to 476 points from 2021 to 2025, overall stable. The university is located in Shaanxi Province (not the home province), accounting for about 2% of Tianjin enrollment, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment. Tianjin examinees have a high acceptance of universities in Beijing, Tianjin, and Shaanxi, with no obvious regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1092, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (30 vs 32), the continuous growth of Tianjin examinees (about 82,000), and the stable attraction of the university's top engineering strength, competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1031, with a fluctuation range of 913–1149.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer Science and Technology)
- Automation
- Engineering Pilot Class (Electrical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Smart Energy)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Aerospace)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Management)
- Accounting (ACCA).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 913–1149, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science/Automation/Electrical Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<913), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 A+ discipline majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>1149), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and carefully select Tier 2.
